message:
feat(repair): add Proof of Retrievability for cryptographic durability audit (bd-7tn4)

Shacham-Waters-style spot-check PoR using BLAKE3 keyed MAC.
Authenticator per block, deterministic challenge generation via XOF,
constant-time verification. 8840 challenges gives 2^{-128} security
against >=1% corruption. 16 tests covering protocol, corruption
detection, missing blocks, nonce replay, and security analysis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
